name: sequence
role: Ordered/contextual sequence of items with separator + position-semantic state. The foundational primitive for breadcrumb / numbered-list / unordered-list / sidebar-vertical affordances. Variants drive visual presentation through tokens.

role.note: Selects the semantic role. Breadcrumb = trail of ancestors with chevron separators + aria-current="page" on terminal item. Ordered-list = <ol> with numeric position indicators. Unordered-list = <ul> with bullet/dot separators. Sidebar-vertical = collapsible vertical list with section headers + aria-current="page" on active item.

separator.note: Separator glyph between items. Defaults per role: breadcrumb=chevron, ordered-list=number, unordered-list=dot, sidebar-vertical=none.

ariaPatterns.breadcrumb: Wrap in <nav aria-label="Breadcrumb">. Terminal item uses aria-current="page" and is NOT a link (just a span).
ariaPatterns.sidebar: Wrap in <nav aria-label="...">. Active item uses aria-current="page".
ariaPatterns.steps: If sequence represents an ordered process, wrap in <nav aria-label="Steps"> and use aria-current="step" on the active step.
